product.highlights:
• Purpose-Built for DJI Osmo Pocket 4P
  • Stores Camera Body and Two Memory Cards
  • Slim Half-Wrap Design for Compact, Effortless Carry
  • Semi-Transparent PC Shell for Charging and Status Checks Without Removal
  • High-Resilience EVA Liner Reduces Everyday Bumps and Scratches
  • Dual Side-Press Latches for Quick, Effortless Opening
  • Button Clearance Design Prevents Accidental Presses
  • Top Lanyard Hole Compatible with JJC LY and APC Series Shoulder Straps
  • Compatible with Original 1/4"-20 Threaded Handle and Battery Handle

skuNames: Sq1 case, orange color. for other colors, please leave a message. not compatible with phone cases

page_json.name: Fuji Instax SQ1 Camera Transparent Protective Case Square Vintage Leather Bag Lens Cap Viewfinder Film Compatible Accessories

title: For instax mini 13 Camera Case PU Leather Soft Protective Case Trave Bag for Fujifilm Film Camera Bag with Shoulder Strap
detail_text: 1. Suitable for Instax Mini 13 instant camera only.Note:Not include the camera. 2. Functional and Durable -The mini 13 case is made of canvas and features a soft microfibre interior that keeps mini 13 instant camera safe from scratches, dust and general wear and tear. 3. Ease of use-flip cover design, the top part of this mini 13 case can be detachable.You do not have to take the camera out when taking pictures. There is also a pocket at the back of the case for your shots to be stored temporally.Enjoy photography happily and easily 4. Convenient to carry- Comes with a removable and adjustable strap for easy carrying. 5. Giftable- Looking cute and packaged in a gift box made it a great gift for someone needing a mini 13 camera case. ​
detail_html:
• 1. Suitable for Instax Mini 13 instant camera only.Note:Not include the camera.
  • 2. Functional and Durable -The mini 13 case is made of canvas and features a soft microfibre interior that keeps mini 13 instant camera safe from scratches, dust and general wear and tear.

product.desc:
:

1. GREAT PROTECTION: The camera case, designed to resist shocks and impacts, offers exceptional security for your camera, safeguarding it against dust, scratches and damage.
2. FITMENT: Unique color printing, bright color, exquisite and fashionable, delicate and beautiful, improve overall appearance. Fit for Fujifilm Instax Mini 12.
3. FLIP DESIGN: You can snap photos without having to remove your camera from the bag, thanks to its flip featured design that does not obstruct the lens, considerate and reliable.
4. MULTIFUNCTIONAL STRAP: The adjustable and removable shoulder strap can be customized to your preferred length and removed whenever necessary, making it convenient to switch between your camera bag and other shoulder bags or cases. It is also effortless to hang and carry.
5. PU LEATHER: Camera protective case is crafted from eco friendly PU leather, which is soft, gentle on the skin, and smooth to touch. Easy to clean and wear resistant, making it highly durable.

Specification:
Item Type: Camera Protective Case
Material: PU Leather
Fitment: Fit for Fujifilm Instax Mini 12

Package List:
1 x Camera Bag
1 x Shoulder Strap

product.desc:
Product Highlights

  • Main Material: Velvet
  • Name: Camera Insert Bag
  • Color: Black, Red, Orange, Blue, Lake blue(optional)
  • Capacity: suitable for three mirrors in one machine (the clapboard is removable)
  • Size: 24*18*12cm
  • Product reference: CHARMHOME Convenient Protection Camera Accessories Velvet Shockproof Camera Lens Cas Camera Bag Partition Padded Bag Photography Protective
  • Available options: Black, Blue, Orange, Red

Product Details

Main Material: Velvet

Name: Camera Insert Bag

Color: Black, Red, Orange, Blue, Lake blue(optional)

Capacity: suitable for three mirrors in one machine (the clapboard is removable)

Size: 24*18*12cm

Made of velvet material, with hook and loop which can your camera from scratch and shock

Can put the bag into backpack, laptop bag, trolley bag, etc

Our portable camera bag is made of velvet material, which is very comfortable to your camera from scratch

Inner partition padded give your camera better protecttion

Compact size that you can also put this camera bag into your backpack or other bags

1 x DSLR camera bag (Not include the camera or other accessories)

Product reference: CHARMHOME Convenient Protection Camera Accessories Velvet Shockproof Camera Lens Cas Camera Bag Partition Padded Bag Photography Protective
product.highlights:
• Easy to store and quick to access.
  • Reliable quality that meets your daily needs.
  • High utility with minimalist design.
  • Exquisite craftsmanship enhances overall texture and feel.
  • Great value for money, practical without compromising on quality.
  • Carefully crafted with attention to detail.
